title: THE OTHERSIDE
description: a bit of another horror mod
body:
### why did i make this mod?
so i was bored of the hell of a lot of basic dweller mods and i like chilling scare type mods more so i made this.
### why are some textures so bad?
well currently i devolop the mod myself and im not that good texture artist.
### why is it still in alpha stage?
same thing as above.
### why would you like to download this?
because maybe you will like a chilling scare also more than a basic dweller.
### why is this description so short?
because im bad at descriptions (sorry modrinth team).
